title: City of Syracuse to Collect Christmas Trees in January
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Public Works will collect natural Christmas trees curbside in January 2024 using a quadrant-based pickup schedule (Jan. 6-7, 13-14, 20-21, 27-28). Residents must remove all decorations and non-organic materials; artificial trees should be disposed of via regular trash service or bulk pickup. Alternative drop-off locations at OCRRA compost sites are available Jan. 2-12.

political_signal.description: Seasonal waste management initiative demonstrating sustainability focus and organized city services delivery to residents

processing_notes: Author listed as Unknown; authored by Office of Communications
